response.global_analysis:
1. JSON Match: The vocal phonetics of 'Brave Shine' matched the official Japanese lyrics provided in the reference JSON perfectly.
2. JSON Usage: Fully utilized the lyrics reference for spelling and translations. Hand-transcribed and translated the conversational banter between Raora and Kronii from 00:00 to 02:21.
3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the introductory conversational dialogue closely to each speaker's bursts. Handled the song lyrics by aligning lines tightly to the musical phrases to prevent overlap or delay. Created a visual subtitle entry for the song's intro credits card.

subtitles.original: Why are you making me laugh?
subtitles.english: Why are you making me laugh?

subtitles.original: Is it because of the yellow?
subtitles.english: Is it because of the yellow?

subtitles.original: It's just, this everything is so beautiful.
subtitles.english: It's just, this everything is so beautiful.

subtitles.original: Who was expecting more like a blue? Because I thought you were like... sad...
subtitles.english: Who was expecting more like a blue? Because I thought you were like... sad...

subtitles.original: You don't have a blue color scheme in your...
subtitles.english: You don't have a blue color scheme in your...

subtitles.original: I know! I give you blue!
subtitles.english: I know! I give you blue!

subtitles.original: Oh. That's... why would you give that to me?
subtitles.english: Oh. That's... why would you give that to me?

subtitles.original: ...all the way here, I give you this beautiful color...
subtitles.english: ...all the way here, I give you this beautiful color...

subtitles.original: But I like you! You're so pretty like blue!
subtitles.english: But I like you! You're so pretty like blue!

subtitles.original: You know what? We can maybe blend blue and pink together to get...
subtitles.english: You know what? We can maybe blend blue and pink together to get...

subtitles.original: What does purple mean? I don't know, we'll find out!
subtitles.english: What does purple mean? I don't know, we'll find out!

subtitles.original: Oh wow, purple... You just spoiled it!
subtitles.english: Oh wow, purple... You just spoiled it!

subtitles.original: We will find out, I guess! I don't know.
subtitles.english: We will find out, I guess! I don't know.

subtitles.original: ...my... my... no, our... That's not your birthday, it's my birthday!
subtitles.english: ...my... my... no, our... That's not your birthday, it's my birthday!

subtitles.original: So we're gonna keep watching, everyone! I'm gonna keep singing and dancing for you, okay?
subtitles.english: So we're gonna keep watching, everyone! I'm gonna keep singing and dancing for you, okay?

subtitles.original: Woo! And be sure to use her hashtag, okay?
subtitles.english: Woo! And be sure to use her hashtag, okay?

subtitles.original: Also thank you Kronii for coming.
subtitles.english: Also thank you Kronii for coming.

subtitles.original: Oh yeah, thank you for having me.
subtitles.english: Oh yeah, thank you for having me.

subtitles.original: Thank you for singing and dancing with me, it was so fun!
subtitles.english: Thank you for singing and dancing with me, it was so fun!

subtitles.original: Okay, keep up the good work!
subtitles.english: Okay, keep up the good work!

subtitles.original: Brave Shine / Lyrics: aimerrhythm Music: 小山 寿
subtitles.english: [Title Card: Brave Shine / Lyrics: aimerrhythm Music: Hisashi Koyama]

subtitles.original: 左手に隠した願いは願いのままで
subtitles.english: With the wish I’d hidden in my left hand still just that - a wish
I dreamed of visions I wouldn’t wake from

subtitles.original: 右手には空の記憶 誰も知らない世界の果て
subtitles.english: In my right hand was my empty memory, at the end of a world nobody else knew about

subtitles.original: 止まない雨に打たれていた
守りたいものを守れる強さ
subtitles.english: The strength to protect the things I’d like to protect

subtitles.original: それを信じられなくなる弱さ
subtitles.english: The weakness that makes me stop believing in it
Accepting it all for what it is

subtitles.original: Brave shine 手を伸ばせばまだ
subtitles.english: Brave shine, if I hold out my hand, I’ll still find...

subtitles.original: Stay the night 傷だらけの夜
subtitles.english: Stay the night, a wounded night...

subtitles.original: You save my life かざした刃の先に
subtitles.english: You save my life, at the tip of the blade I held up

subtitles.original: 光ること忘れた青い星が残してく
subtitles.english: I watched the lasting shadows left behind
By the blue stars that had forgotten how to shine

subtitles.original: すれ違う赤の軌道 何も知らない子供のまま
subtitles.english: Passing the red tracks like a child who doesn't know a thing

subtitles.original: 明けない夜を彷徨ってた
subtitles.english: I wandered through a never-ending night

subtitles.original: 失くせないものを失くした弱さ
subtitles.english: The weakness that made me lose things I can’t lose

subtitles.original: 何も信じられなくなる脆さ
subtitles.english: The fragility that makes me stop believing in anything
Even when I can no longer stand...
